name: Refrigerator Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by Sue Klapper
In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, butter, eggs, and vanilla. Stir in flour, salt, baking soda, and nuts. Divide the dough into three parts. Shape each part into a roll and wrap in waxed paper. Refrigerate at least 4 hours.
Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Cut the dough into 1/8 inch slices. Place them 1 inch apart on ungreased baking sheets. Bake until light brown, about 7 to 9 minutes.
